  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2023-01-17T01:56:53.200503Z",
     "start_time": "2023-01-17T01:56:53.174986Z"

   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def ReadData(path):\n",
    "    df = pd.read_excel(path)\n",
    "    df.dropna(axis=0,how='any',inplace=True)\n",
    "    return df\n",
    "\n",
    "def KeepCompletedData(df):\n",
    "    df_data_count = df['Material No. '].value_counts().rename_axis('Material_Completed').to_frame('counts')\n",
    "    completed_number = df_data_count['counts'].max()\n",
    "    df_complete_data = df_data_count[df_data_count['counts']==completed_number]\n",
    "    df_complete_data.reset_index(drop=False,inplace=True)\n",
    "    df_complete_data = df_complete_data['Material_Completed']\n",
    "    df = pd.merge(df,df_complete_data,left_on='Material No. ',right_on='Material_Completed',how='inner')\n",
    "    df.drop(columns=['Sum of cVMC','Material_Completed','Layer','Sublayer','Branding Name'],axis=1,inplace=True)\n",
    "    return df\n",
    "\n",
    "def CreateTimeSeriesData(df,save_name):\n",
    "    df = df.astype({'Year':'str','month':'str'})\n",
    "    df['date_'] = df['Year'] + '-' +  df['month']\n",
    "    df.drop(columns=['Year','month'],inplace=True)\n",
    "    df.to_csv(save_name,index=0)\n",
    "\n",
    "def CreateTimeSeriesDataFrame(df_cost_period,mat_no,cost_item):\n",
    "    df = df_cost_period[['Material No. ',cost_item]]\n",
    "    df = df[df['Material No. ']==mat_no]\n",
    "    df.drop('Material No. ',axis=1,inplace=True)\n",
    "    return df\n",
    "\n",
    "def RunADFTEST(df):\n",
    "    adf_test = ADFTest(alpha=0.05)\n",
    "    result = adf_test.should_diff(df)[1]\n",
    "    score = adf_test.should_diff(df)[0]\n",
    "    return result,score\n",
    "\n",
    "\n",
    "def test_stationarity(timeseries):\n",
    "    \n",
    "    #Determing rolling statistics\n",
    "    movingAverage = timeseries.rolling(window=12).mean()\n",
    "    movingSTD = timeseries.rolling(window=12).std()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    #Plot rolling statistics\n",
    "    plt.figure(figsize=(16,5))\n",
    "    orig = plt.plot(timeseries,color='blue',label='Original')\n",
    "    mean = plt.plot(movingAverage,color='red',label='Rolling Mean')\n",
    "    std = plt.plot(movingSTD,color='black',label='Rolling Std')\n",
    "    plt.legend(loc='best')\n",
    "    plt.title('Rolling Mean & Standard Deviation')\n",
    "    plt.show()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    print('Result of Dickey-Fuller Test:')\n",
    "    dftest = adfuller(timeseries,autolag='AIC')\n",
    "    dfoutput = pd.Series(dftest[0:4],index=['Test Statistic','p-value','#lags used','Number of Observation Used'])\n",
    "    for key,value in dftest[4].items():\n",
    "        dfoutput['Critical Value (%s)'%key] = value\n",
    "#     print(dfoutput['Critical Value (5%)'])\n",
    "    print(dfoutput)\n",
    "    \n",
    "    \n",
    "def plot_all_parts(df):\n",
    "    part_lst = df['Material No. '].unique().tolist()\n",
    "    plt.style.use('ggplot')\n",
    "    fig, ax = plt.subplots()\n",
    "    for i in part_lst:\n",
    "        indexedDataset = df.set_index('date_')\n",
    "        df_plot = indexedDataset[indexedDataset['Material No. ']==i]\n",
    "        df_plot = df_plot[['Sum of cDist']]\n",
    "        df_plot.plot(ax=ax,figsize=(20,16))\n",
    "    return plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "def plot_part(Material_No,df_cost_period):\n",
    "    plt.style.use('ggplot')\n",
    "    fig, ax = plt.subplots()\n",
    "    \n",
    "    for i in ['Sum of cCOPM','Sum of cDist','Sum of cFMC']:\n",
    "        df_plot = df_cost_period[df_cost_period['Material No. ']==Material_No]\n",
    "        df_plot = df_plot[[i]]\n",
    "        df_plot.plot(ax=ax,figsize=(16,12))\n",
    "    plt.ylabel('Cost',fontdict={'fontsize':15,'color':'navy','weight':'bold'})\n",
    "    plt.xlabel('Period',fontdict={'fontsize':15,'color':'navy','weight':'bold'})\n",
    "    plt.tick_params(labelsize=13)\n",
    "    plt.legend(fontsize=15)\n",
    "    plt.title('2019/01 to 2021/08 for Material %s'%Material_No,fontdict={'fontsize':18,'color':'navy','weight':'bold'})\n",
    "    return plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },

    "import itertools\n",
    "# Define the p, d and q parameters to take any value between 0 and 2\n",
    "p = d = q = range(0, 2)\n",
    "# Generate all different combinations of p, q and q triplets\n",
    "pdq = list(itertools.product(p, d, q))\n",
    "print(pdq)\n",
    "# Generate all different combinations of seasonal p, q and q triplets\n",
    "seasonal_pdq = [(x[0], x[1], x[2], 12) for x in list(itertools.product(p, d, q))]\n",
    "print(seasonal_pdq)\n",
    "\n",
    "import warnings\n",
    "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\")  # specify to ignore warning messages\n",
    "best_results=1e10\n",
    "for param in pdq:\n",
    "    for param_seasonal in seasonal_pdq:\n",
    "        try:\n",
    "            model = sm.tsa.statespace.SARIMAX(df_test, order=param, seasonal_order=param_seasonal,enforce_stationarity=False, enforce_invertibility=False)\n",
    "            results = model.fit()\n",
    "            print('ARIMA{}x{} - AIC:{}'.format(param, param_seasonal, results.aic))\n",
    "            if best_results>results.aic:\n",
    "                best_results=results.aic\n",
    "                best_pdq=param\n",
    "                best_pdqs=param_seasonal\n",
    "        except:\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "print(\"最好的参数组合为：\",best_pdq,best_pdqs)\n"
   ]

    "import pmdarima as pm\n",
    "from pmdarima.model_selection import train_test_split\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "# Load/split your data\n",
    "# y = pm.datasets.load_wineind()\n",
    "y = df_test\n",
    "train, test = train_test_split(y, train_size=700)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Fit your model\n",
    "# model = pm.auto_arima(train, seasonal=True, m=12)\n",
    "model = pm.auto_arima(train)\n",
    "\n",
    "# make your forecasts\n",
    "forecasts = model.predict(test.shape[0])  # predict N steps into the future\n",
    "\n",
    "# Visualize the forecasts (blue=train, green=forecasts)\n",
    "x = np.arange(y.shape[0])\n",
    "plt.plot(x[:700], train, c='blue')\n",
    "plt.plot(x[700:], forecasts, c='green')\n",
    "plt.show()"
